response.step_by_step_log: The video begins with a musical performance by the unit 'Secret Society holoX'. Using the provided on-screen text ('#SSholox4周年') and the song title '常夜リペイント' which is synonymous with holoX's history, I identified the song. I searched for the lyrics of '常夜リペイント' and found them. After the song, the members engage in a conversation presenting merchandise, followed by a promotion for 'Timee'. No other songs were performed.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance of the song '常夜リペイント' (Jōya Repaint) by the VTuber unit 'Secret Society holoX' (composed of La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha), followed by a segment where the members present merchandise, including acrylic color paper, card sleeves, acrylic stands, and commemorative medals, and finally a promotional segment for a 'Timee' collaboration.

scenes.description: The members of holoX perform the song '常夜リペイント'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Bow down right there!
I'll slash through the reality that you'd rather spit out and discard
Children lost in an endless samsara
I'll lure you with jet-black wings
We are the ones who rule the stars of Eden, the Secret Society... holoX!!
(That is!) 
(Woah-oh, woah-oh-oh-oh-oh...)
How low?
This hopeless world
(What do you want?)
Black out
The bell announcing the end tolls
La-pa-pa-pa-pa-la
Let's dance and trip
Whether you're an introvert or an extrovert, sing a song
Only things that feel good are everything
Fall to the bottom of the darkness
Sweet, sweet melody
Look, please, please, follow the sound of clapping
There's no running away anymore
Look, if you're dyed in the darkness
Repaint the world
If you wish, I'll give you everything
Break the common sense, throw it away
Spin 'til you're crazy, set it on fire
(La-pa-pa-pa, la-pa)
Devour everything
(La-pa-pa-pa, la-pa)
I'll tell you the secret
(Woah-oh, woah-oh-oh-oh-oh...)
Charisma of evil, I will lead the masses
I don't know about justice, I'll lure you by shaking the ground
Serious about being unserious, a rite of passage for our company
Fulfill desires, demands, and dreams, world conquest!
La-pa-pa-pa, let's sing
Let's swing
Bye-bye-bye to the boring world
I'll show you a dream that will never end
Look, go to sleep
Further, further inside
Look, please, please, you want to go, don't you?
There's no stopping it now
Look, if you're dyed in the evil
Repaint the world
I'll give you everything you desire
Rewrite the rules
Spin 'til you're done, burn it all down
(La-pa-pa-pa, la-pa)
To all the fakes
(La-pa-pa-pa, la-pa)
I'll tell you
The secret
The time is ripe! The madness banquet begins!
You guys, are you ready!?
Oh!!! Look and learn!!!
[...Members' names and call-outs...]
"World conquest holoX! Change the world holoX!"
[...More call-outs...]
"World conquest holoX! Change the world holoX! Get the world in our hands holoX!"
Set your heart free
Look, please, please, surrender yourself
There's no running away anymore
Look, if you're dyed in the darkness
Repaint the world
If you wish, I'll give you everything
Break the common sense, throw it away
Spin 'til you're crazy, set it on fire
(La-pa-pa-pa, la-pa)
Devour everything
(La-pa-pa-pa, la-pa)
I'll tell you the secret
(Woah-oh, woah-oh-oh-oh-oh...)",reference_lyrics_og:

scenes.description: The members of holoX talk to the camera, presenting merchandise for their 4th anniversary.
The members present a promotional clip for their collaboration with 'Timee'.
